title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Doubtnut - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Doubtnut - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!
